name: Kale and Radicchio Salad
steps: Strip all the leaves of the purple kale.
Bring the mushroom stock to the boil then pour over the kale leaves so they are covered with the stock.
Allow to cool then remove and strain.
Once dry and crispy remove and store.
Mix all the ingredients together and bring to the boil.
Pour the liquid over the onion and allow to cool.
Once cooled, strain off the liquid and reserve the red onion.
Spread the onion over a silpat and dry in the dehydrator for two days, then blend into a powder.
Place the two ingredients in a vacuum bag and seal at 100%.
Trim the base, wash the leaves and dry and store in fridge.
